import subprocess, os, time
# Delete old Dark Beast model
old_file = "/opt/ComfyUI/models/unet/darkBeastKrea2_darkBeastKREA2_fp8.safetensors"
if os.path.exists(old_file):
    os.remove(old_file)
    msg = f"Deleted old model: {os.path.basename(old_file)}\n"
else:
    msg = "Old model already gone\n"

# Start RedMix download with civitai.red cookie
url = "https://civitai.red/api/download/models/3086841?fileId=2968503"
token = "eyJhbGciOiJFUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6ImNpdml0YWktZGV2LTIwMjYtMDYtZWMiLCJ0eXAiOiJKV1QifQ.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjUxNzc5MiIsInNpZ25lZEF0IjoxNzgyODM0MjM0MTIwLCJpYXQiOjE3ODI4MzQyMzQsImV4cCI6MTc4NTQyNjIzNCwianRpIjoiZDAwNzExZjQtYjM1NS00N2E4LTg1NTctMzlkNzZiZDkwZjczIiwiaXNzIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hdXRoLmNpdml0YWkuY29tIn0.DUL1e3yfNqyNkIMBEa1-tTTZ53V8jnHOlKYsnrf9TKkGgPIJTNO83fdyojSB5afJOo-2aXUWXPUq5c7FVzu1yQ"
out_dir = "/opt/ComfyUI/models/unet"
out_file = os.path.join(out_dir, "Krea2RedMix2.1-8Steps-fp8-scaled-ComfyUI.safetensors")
log_file = "/tmp/redmix_download.log"
cmd = f'nohup curl -L -o "{out_file}" -H "Cookie: __Secure-civ-token={token}" "{url}" > {log_file} 2>&1 &'
subprocess.Popen(cmd, shell=True)
time.sleep(2)
pid = subprocess.run("pgrep -f 'curl.*3086841'", shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True).stdout.strip()
return msg + f"Download started. PID={pid}\nFile: {out_file}\nLog: {log_file}"
